hero.headline: Transforming Ideas Into Powerful Digital Solutions
hero.description: Threemates is a technology company providing modern IT services including ERP systems, SaaS platforms, web development, and mobile applications. We help businesses and organizations digitize operations and build scalable software products.

benefits.title: We build software that powers your business growth.
benefits.description: From ERP systems to SaaS platforms, we deliver end-to-end technology solutions that help organizations streamline operations and scale efficiently.

items.title: Scalable Architecture
items.description: We build systems designed to grow with your business, handling increased load and complexity effortlessly.

items.title: Rapid Development
items.description: Agile development methodology ensures fast delivery without compromising on quality or reliability.

items.title: End-to-End Solutions
items.description: From requirement analysis to deployment and maintenance, we handle the complete software lifecycle.

items.title: Modern Tech Stack
items.description: We use cutting-edge technologies like React, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure for optimal performance.

items.title: Transparent Process
items.description: Clear communication, regular updates, and milestone-based delivery keep you informed at every stage.

items.title: Dedicated Support
items.description: Our team provides ongoing maintenance, updates, and technical support to ensure system reliability.

services.title: Our Core Services
services.description: We provide end-to-end IT services to help businesses build, scale, and optimize digital products across multiple platforms.

items.title: ERP Solutions
items.description: Complete ERP systems for schools, colleges, hospitals, and businesses including HR, billing, inventory, and analytics.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: Modern web applications built using scalable technologies such as React, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure.

items.title: Mobile App Development
items.description: Cross-platform mobile applications for Android and iOS with seamless backend integration.

items.title: SaaS Development
items.description: Development of scalable SaaS platforms with multi-tenant architecture, subscription systems, and cloud deployment.

mission.text: Guided by {innovation}, powered by {technology}. We build digital solutions that help organizations {transform} and thrive in the modern era.

ctaCard.title: Have a project idea?

about.label: Learn more about Threemates
about.text: We're not just developers — we're technology partners who understand your business challenges and build solutions that work.
about.highlight: Combining deep technical expertise with industry knowledge, we create software platforms that automate operations, improve productivity, and drive growth.

plan.name: Development Partnership Plan
plan.description: Ideal for organizations needing ongoing software development and support.

scheduleCard.title: Schedule a strategy consultation
scheduleCard.description: Share your goals, product scope, and delivery timeline with our team. We will turn the discussion into a practical roadmap for design, development, and launch.
